hook.summary: A cat jumps on a keyboard, startling a man who then sighs.
hook.visual_action: An orange cat jumps onto a desk keyboard in front of a computer monitor, startling a man in a chair.

scene_flow: Austin is startled by a cat jumping on his keyboard while he is at his computer.
The scene transitions to a match-3 puzzle board featuring colorful buttons and gems.
A hand interacts with the puzzle, matching items to uncover a hidden cardboard box.
A white cat is revealed from the box upon completing the match sequence.
The final screen displays a level selection menu with a 'Play Now!' button.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy lighthearted character-driven stories and match-3 puzzles.
